name: PLAYSTUDIOS, Inc.
summary: PART I Introduction Acies was incorporated on August 14, 2020 for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Acies completed its initial public offering in October 2020. On June 21, 2021, Acies consummated the Acies Merger with Old PLAYSTUDIOS, pursuant to the Merger Agreement. In connection with the closing of the Acies Merger , we changed our name to PLAYSTUDIOS, Inc. PLAYSTU...
